assertion_results.text: Impact map or task descriptions explicitly flag at least 3 ambiguities from the feature description
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md explicitly identifies 5 ambiguities under '## Ambiguities Identified': (1) 'No quantitative performance targets' — the requirement 'Search should be faster' provides no measurable targets; (2) 'No definition of relevant results' — no ranking criteria or examples of irrelevant results; (3) 'Filter specification is vague' — only says 'Some kind of filtering capability' with no details on entities, fields, or filter types; (4) 'Don't break existing functionality is untestable as stated'; (5) 'Better UI is out of scope'. This exceeds the minimum of 3.

assertion_results.text: Plan acknowledges that 'Better UI' (non-MVP) cannot be planned without design mockups or frontend repository and excludes it from scope
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md Ambiguity 5 states: 'The non-MVP requirement "Better UI" cannot be planned because: No frontend repository is listed in the Repository Registry... No Figma mockups or design specifications have been provided... No design criteria for "better" have been defined. This requirement is excluded from the implementation plan.' The Scope exclusion section reiterates: '"Better UI" requirement (non-MVP): Excluded. No frontend repository exists in the Repository Registry and no design mockups were provided.'

assertion_results.text: Tasks still follow the task-description-template.md format despite ambiguous requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 task files follow the template structure defined in task-description-template.md. Each contains the required sections: ## Repository (single repo name), ## Description, ## Files to Modify, ## Implementation Notes, ## Acceptance Criteria (with checkbox items), ## Test Requirements (with checkbox items). Optional sections are correctly included where applicable: Files to Create (task-1), API Changes (tasks 2-3), Reuse Candidates (all tasks), Dependencies (tasks 2-4). No extraneous or non-template sections are present.

assertion_results.text: Tasks document assumptions where they fill in missing details, labeled as assumptions pending clarification
assertion_results.evidence: Every task contains explicit assumption labels: Task 1 Description: 'assumption pending clarification with product owner' about searchable fields; Task 1 Implementation Notes: 'Confirm with product owner' about field weights. Task 2 Description: 'assumption pending clarification' about relevance meaning ts_rank. Task 3 Description: 'assumption pending clarification with product owner' about filter types (entity type and severity). Task 4 Description: 'assumption pending clarification' about performance targets. The impact map also labels each ambiguity with 'Assumption (pending clarification)' blocks.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 task files begin with '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' — each listing exactly one repository name. Task 1 line 1-2: '## Repository\ntrustify-backend'. Task 2 line 1-2: same. Task 3 line 1-2: same. Task 4 line 1-2: same. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 4 tasks contain these three required sections. Task 1: '## Description' (line 4), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 31, 6 items), '## Test Requirements' (line 39, 4 items). Task 2: '## Description' (line 4), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 35, 6 items), '## Test Requirements' (line 43, 5 items). Task 3: '## Description' (line 4), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 39, 8 items), '## Test Requirements' (line 49, 7 items). Task 4: '## Description' (line 4), '## Acceptance Criteria' (line 34, 5 items), '## Test Requirements' (line 41, 3 items).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Cross-referencing all Files to Modify/Create paths against repo-backend.md directory tree: Task 1 modifies 'migration/src/lib.rs' (manifest line 17) and creates 'migration/src/m0002_search_indexes/mod.rs' (new file following the existing migration pattern of m0001_initial at manifest line 19). Task 2 modifies 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (manifest line 91) and 'common/src/db/query.rs' (manifest line 27). Task 3 modifies 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs' (manifest line 93) and 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (manifest line 91). Task 4 modifies 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (manifest line 91) and 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs' (manifest line 93). All paths match the manifest; no invented paths.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 Implementation Notes reference: 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' (specific existing migration), 'migration/src/lib.rs' (registration location), 'migration/Cargo.toml', SeaORM migration traits, specific SQL patterns (setweight, to_tsvector, tsvector, GIN). Task 2 references: 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs' (SearchService), 'common/src/db/query.rs' (shared query helpers), 'common/src/error.rs::AppError', 'common/src/model/paginated.rs::PaginatedResults<T>', specific patterns 'Result<T, AppError>' with '.context()' wrapping. Task 3 references: 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs', 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs', 'common/src/db/query.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs' (AdvisorySummary severity field), Axum Query<T> extractor. Task 4 references: 'modules/search/src/service/mod.rs::SearchService', 'modules/search/src/endpoints/mod.rs', std::time::Instant code pattern, tower-http caching middleware (from Key Conventions), Result<T, AppError> pattern.
